name: AbsolutData Holdings, Inc. (Acquired by Infogain Corp.)
lede: AbsolutData runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Gurugram, covering GBS, built over seventeen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AbsolutData office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AbsolutData GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AbsolutData runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram), covering GBS. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.
